---
title: "About me!"
format: html
---

-   1 sister, baba lives with me, parents

    -   photos of fam

-   Half bulgarian

    -   photos from bulgaria

-   from oakland CA

    -   happy place is the forest near my house, in cafés, and hiking with my friends

-   lived in morocco (pic from there)

-   studied abroad in madrid

    -   studying spanish since 6th grade

-   favorite travel destinations!
